item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push Chrome Silicon Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: For the fifth straight session, Chrome Silicon Ltd closed lower, breaching its 52-week low at Rs 36.72 on 28 Apr 2026, marking a significant setback amid a volatile trading environment. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But HCL Technologies Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: HCL Technologies Ltd’s stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.1197 on 28 April 2026, marking a significant drop amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. The stock’s fall reflects a combination of subdued financial results and technical indicators signalling bearish momentum. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Oxford Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 17.94
item.description: After a sustained rally spanning 21 consecutive trading sessions, Oxford Industries Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 17.94 on 28 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 50.38% gain over this period. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of broad technical alignment and price momentum that has propelled the stock well above its key moving averages. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Biogen Pharmachem Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 0.46 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline has pushed Biogen Pharmachem Industries Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 0.46 on 28 Apr 2026, marking a 47.25% drop over the past year and underscoring persistent selling pressure despite pockets of financial improvement. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Uflex Ltd Surges 9.3% to Day's High of Rs 434.65 — Outperforms Packaging Sector by 11.07 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.41% on 28 Apr 2026 while Uflex Ltd surged 9.3%, marking an 11.07-percentage-point outperformance over its Packaging sector peers. This sharp intraday gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Julien Agro Infratech Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broadly positive market environment with several indices hitting new 52-week highs, Julien Agro Infratech Ltd has plunged to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 1.65 on 28 Apr 2026, marking a steep 62.67% decline over the past year and underperforming the Sensex by a wide margin. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Sunrakshakk Industries India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 301
item.description: Surging to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 301 on 28 Apr 2026, Sunrakshakk Industries India Ltd has demonstrated remarkable price momentum, outperforming its sector and the broader market despite a subdued Sensex. This milestone caps a four-day rally that has delivered a 10.85% gain, underscoring the stock’s robust technical backdrop and sustained buying interest. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Infosys Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 1152.25 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, Infosys Ltd closed lower, slipping to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 1152.25 on 28 Apr 2026. This decline comes despite the broader market showing mixed signals, with several indices hitting new highs, underscoring a stock-specific weakness that has persisted over the past year. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Integrated Thermoplastics Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 6.3 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline over the past two sessions has dragged Integrated Thermoplastics Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 6.3 on 28 Apr 2026, marking a 26.5% drop over the last year and signalling intensified selling pressure despite some recent profit growth. Time: 40 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Sunrakshakk Industries India Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Extending its winning streak to four consecutive sessions, Sunrakshakk Industries India Ltd surged 4.17% on 28 Apr 2026 to touch an all-time high near Rs 301, significantly outpacing the Sensex which declined 0.49% on the same day. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: Novartis India Ltd Surges 7.51% to Day's High of Rs 1046.4 — Outperforms Sector by 5.04 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.47% on 28 Apr 2026, while Novartis India Ltd surged 7.51%, outperforming its Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector by 5.04 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Vardhman Special Steels Ltd Surges 11.38% to Day's High of Rs 301 — Outperforms Sector by 9.7 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.47% on 28 Apr 2026, while Vardhman Special Steels Ltd surged 11.38%, marking a remarkable 9.7-percentage-point outperformance over its Iron & Steel Products sector. The stock's intraday high of Rs 301 represents a strong single-session gain that rewrites the short-term narrative for this small-cap steel player. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Vishal Mega Mart Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd (VMM), a mid-cap player in the diversified retail sector, has witnessed a notable 10.02% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and evolving investor positioning. Despite a modest 1.19% price gain on 28 Apr 2026, the underlying shifts in volume and futures activity suggest a complex interplay of bullish and cautious sentiment among traders. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Waaree Energies Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Signalling Bullish Market Positioning
item.description: Waaree Energies Ltd has witnessed a notable 12.55% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market participation and potential directional bets. This surge accompanies a strong price performance, with the stock outperforming its sector and trading above all key moving averages, reflecting growing investor confidence in the mid-cap electrical equipment player. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector peers with a 4.02% gain on 28 Apr 2026, supported by robust volume and evolving market positioning. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Nippon Life India Asset Management Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd (NAM-INDIA) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock hit a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1,065 on 28 Apr 2026, outperforming its sector and broader indices amid robust volume and positive technical indicators. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: UPL Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: UPL Ltd., a mid-cap player in the Pesticides & Agrochemicals sector, has witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, rising by 11.98% to 38,157 contracts from 34,076 previously. This increase, coupled with steady volume and mixed price action, signals evolving market positioning and potential directional bets among traders. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Max Financial Services Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Max Financial Services Ltd (MFSL) has witnessed a notable 10.8% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this, the stock’s price movement remains subdued, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and bearish bets amid a cautious insurance sector backdrop. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Phoenix Mills Ltd. Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Phoenix Mills Ltd., a mid-cap player in the realty sector, witnessed a significant 22.46% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 27 April 2026, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning despite the stock underperforming its sector and broader indices. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Inox Wind Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Inox Wind Ltd, a small-cap player in the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector, has witnessed a notable 12.15% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and evolving investor positioning. Despite this, the stock underperformed its sector and broader indices, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and bearish sentiments among traders. Time: 44 minutes ago
